text: Specifying 'overflow: visible' on img, video and canvas tags may cause them to produce visual content outside of the element bounds. See https://github.com/WICG/view-transitions/blob/main/debugging_overflow_on_images.md for details.
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()

Specifying 'overflow: visible' on img, video and canvas tags may cause them to produce visual content outside of the element bounds. See https://github.com/WICG/view-transitions/blob/main/debugging_overflow_on_images.md for details.
